message:
🐛 Fix ERR_INCOMPLETE_CHUNKED_ENCODING on slow networks (#1473)

- Add haproxy.router.openshift.io/timeout: 5m to OpenShift route
  (default 30s was killing transfers before completion)
- Add WriteTimeout=5m, IdleTimeout=2m to Fiber server config
- Pre-compress all static assets at build time (.gz + .br) via
  vite-plugin-compression2, served with Content-Length headers to
  avoid chunked Transfer-Encoding entirely
- Skip compress middleware for static assets (served pre-compressed)
- Custom preCompressedStatic handler picks .br > .gz > raw based on
  Accept-Encoding, always sends Content-Length for reliable delivery

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 import { defineConfig } from 'vitest/config'
 import react from '@vitejs/plugin-react'
 import istanbul from 'vite-plugin-istanbul'
+import { compression } from 'vite-plugin-compression2'
 import { execSync } from 'child_process'
 import path from 'path'
 
@@ -49,6 +50,9 @@ export default defineConfig(({ mode }) => ({
   },
   plugins: [
     react(),
+    // Pre-compress assets at build time — avoids chunked encoding on slow networks
+    compression({ algorithm: 'gzip', exclude: [/\.(br)$/], threshold: 1024 }),
+    compression({ algorithm: 'brotliCompress', exclude: [/\.(gz)$/], threshold: 1024 }),
     // Enable Istanbul instrumentation for E2E coverage
     isE2ECoverage &&
       istanbul({
